Well if you haven't noticed by the major updates made on this site, it is under new management, as the previous owner KemoNSA, hadn't the time to update it anymore. A special thanks to him for entrusting me with the responsibility of updating this site. Everything here was started by him, I'm merely adding my own special spice to it, while keeping the same level of coolness. If you'd like to contact him or me, our Email addresses will be listed below.
